content:
Selected publications:
W. Bjorndahl and J. Camp. “BeamMix: 3D Gaussian Mixture-of-Experts for Element-Space Wireless Channel Modeling.” In ACM International Conference on Mobile Systems, Applications, and Services (MobiSys), June 2026. W. Bjorndahl, M. O’Hair, B. Zoghi, and J. Camp. “SPARK: Sparse Parametric Antenna Representation using Kernels.” In IEEE International Conference on Computer Communications (INFOCOM), May 2026. W. Bjorndahl, M. Singh, F. Nouri, and J. Camp. “PropSplat: Map-Free RF Field Reconstruction via 3D Gaussian Propagation Splatting.” In IEEE International Symposium on Dynamic Spectrum Access Networks (DySPAN), May 2026. C. Sayre, W. Bjorndahl, E. C. Larson, J. Camp, R. Rodriguez-Davila, M. Quevedo-Lopez, and B. Gnade. “Low cost, mobile radiation anomaly detection with deep adversarial auto encoders on the edge.” Engineering Applications of Artificial Intelligence, Vol. 164, Part B, 2026, Article 113278. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.engappai.2025.113278. (H-5 Index: 154, Impact Factor: 8.0) M. Singh, W. Bjorndahl, G. S. Aujla, and J. Camp. “T-BLAST: Token-Based Leveraging of Autonomous Spectrum Trading.” In IEEE International Symposium on Dynamic Spectrum Access Networks (DySPAN), May 2025. R. Ventura, W. Bjorndahl, and G. Vejarano. “Targeted Broadcast in Vehicular Ad-Hoc Networks.” In IEEE Latin-American Conference on Communications (LATINCOM), November 2023.
